lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Jerry stepped off the taxi and wheeled his suitcase through the automatic doors of the airport. The hustle and bustle of the terminal filled his ears as he navigated his way towards the check-in counters. Where was Jerry heading to?

translations.Somali: Jerry wuxuu ka degay taksiga isagoo boorsooyin la socda oo ka tallaabaya albaabbada iswada ee garoonka diyaaradaha. Shucaaca iyo mashquulka terminalka ayaa dhegihiisa buuxiyay isagoo ka dhex soconaya si uu ugu tago xafiisyada hubinta. Halkee ayuu Jerry u socday?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: The check-in counters. As he approached the check-in area, Jerry paused for a moment to check his pockets and bags to ensure he had all his essentials: wallet, phone, tickets, and—his heart sank. His passport. It wasn't in his jacket pocket, nor in his carry-on bag. What was the item his wasn't able to find?

translations.Somali: Xafiisyada hubinta. Markii uu u soo dhawaaday aagga hubinta, Jerry wuxuu hakaday si uu u hubiyo jeebkiisa iyo boorsooyinkiisa si uu u xaqiijiyo inuu haysto waxyaabihii muhiimka ahaa: boorsadiisa, telefoonkiisa, tigidhada, iyo—wadnihiisu wuu degay. Baasaboorkiisu. Ma uusan kujirin jeebka jaakaddiisa, mana kujirin boorsadiisa gacanta. Waa maxay shayga uu uusan awoodin inuu helo?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Right, his passport. Panic started to set in as he frantically rummaged through his belongings, but his passport was nowhere to be found. How did he feel?

translations.Somali: Sax, baasaboorkiisi. Wuxuu bilaabay inuu welwelo maadaama uu si qallafsan ugu dhex baadhay agabkiisa, laakiin baasaboorkiisii meelna lagama helin. Sidee buu dareemay?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Yep. He felt panic. Realizing he must have left it at home, Jerry's mind raced with thoughts of what to do next. He stepped aside from the line, trying to stay calm. Was he still in line at the check-in counters?

translations.Somali: Haa. Wuxuu dareemay welwel. Markuu gartay inuu baasaboorkiisii guriga ku ilduufay, maskaxdiisa ayaa fikrado kala duwan kusoo dhacayeen waxa uu samayn doono xiga. Wuxuu ka dhaqaaqay safka isagoo isku dayaya inuu degganaado. Ma weli ayuu ku jiray safka xafiisyada hubinta?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: No. He had to step out. He called his roommate, Mark, who answered after a couple of rings. What did Jerry say to Mark?

translations.Somali: Maya. Wuxuu ka dhaqaaqay safka. Wuxuu wacay saaxiibkiis qol wadaaga la ah, Mark, kaasoo ka jawaabay kadib dhowr goor oo telefoonku dhacay. Maxaa Jerry ku yiri Mark?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: —Mark, I need a huge favor— Jerry said, trying to keep his voice steady. —I think I left my passport at home. Can you check my desk and bring it to the airport as quickly as you can?—

translations.Somali: —Mark, waxaan kaa codsanayaa inaan gacan weyn iga siiso— ayuu yiri Jerry isagoo isku dayaya inuu codkiisu degganaado. —Waxaan u maleynayaa inaan baasaboorkeygii guriga ku ilduufay. Miyaad miiska ii fiirin kartaa oo garoonka diyaaradaha sida ugu dhaqsaha badan iigu keeni kartaa?—
